hero.badge: Psychiatric care serving California and Nevada
hero.headline: Elevate your mental wellness with compassionate psychiatric care
hero.description: We provide individualized psychiatric care and brief psychotherapy designed to help you feel better and live better. Virtual consultation is available for your convenience.

services.heading: Compassionate care for a wide range of mental health needs
services.detailPlaceholder: Tap any service below to read more about how we can support you.
services.footnote:
At Elevate, we individualize your psychiatric care and prioritize your privacy.
We use a HIPAA compliant telehealth platform to ensure your utmost confidentiality.

about.heading: Rohzan G. Altre, PMHNP
paragraphs: Rohzan is a Board-Certified Psychiatric Nurse Practitioner specializing in ages across the life span. She is licensed to practice in the state of California and Nevada. She specializes in ADHD, autism related behavioral problems, Anxiety Disorder, Depression, Bipolar Disorder, and PTSD.

Rohzan utilizes her extensive experience as a psychiatric nurse to provide individualized care to every patient. She understands that mental health care requires careful examination of all aspects in every patient's life to support healing and stability.

items.quote: Any psychiatrist can write a prescription and you're done. Rohzan goes the extra mile and that is how she has been helping me and she has saved my life with proper diagnoses, treatment, and advice.
items.author: Alfred

items.quote: I can't say enough about my great experience with Rohzan. She helped me through the hardest time in my life. I highly recommend her to anyone facing a challenging situation — JUST TAKE ONE DAY AT A TIME.
items.author: Denise

items.quote: She's a psych NP who shows genuine empathy and professionalism which helped me to open up to her so comfortably. She's awesome!
items.author: Calvin

payment.heading: We accept most major insurance plans

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: I am currently in network with some insurance companies. Please contact the clinic to confirm your coverage before scheduling an appointment.

items.question: What are your fees?
items.answer: Fee details may vary depending on service type and insurance coverage. Contact the clinic for current pricing and billing codes.

items.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
items.answer: Payment information can be confirmed before your appointment. Use the Bill Pay option for billing convenience.

items.question: Do you offer virtual appointments?
items.answer: Yes. Virtual consultation is available for convenience through a HIPAA compliant telehealth platform.
